channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ontario tribunal finds long-term resident without legal immigration status eligible for Ontario Works benefits under current legislation
item.description: An Ontario Social Benefits Tribunal has ruled that a man who has lived in Canada without legal immigration status for more than two decades is eligible to receive financial assistance through the Onta...

item.title: South Africa's Rugby Team Faces Challenges in Nations Championship Clash Against Scotland
item.description: The Springboks faced a challenging encounter against Scotland in the Nations Championship at Loftus Versfeld, where cultural displays and stadium innovations added to the spectacle. Scottish performer...

item.title: El Niño Disrupts Pacific Fisheries with Divergent Impacts
item.description: El Niño, a natural climate phenomenon characterized by warmer-than-average sea surface temperatures in the Pacific, is already causing significant disruptions to fisheries worldwide. In Peru, anchovy ...

item.title: Nasarawa Amazons Clinch Third Federation Cup Title After Penalty Shootout
item.description: Nasarawa Amazons FC of Lafia have secured their third President Federation Cup title after a thrilling 5-4 penalty shootout victory over Heartland Queens of Owerri in the final match held at Asaba Sta...

item.title: Controversial goal sparks debate in England-Norway World Cup clash
item.description: In a dramatic World Cup quarter-final clash between England and Norway, controversy surrounded the lead-up to England's first goal. Norway's goalkeeper, Orjan Nyland, took a goal kick that appeared to...

item.title: Generational Attitudes and the Conversation on Reproduction
item.description: The article explores generational tensions around reproduction, using a conversation between the author and a young man about vasectomies. The author reflects on how older generations often criticize ...

item.title: Impact of GST Hike on Hybrid Vehicle Prices in Pakistan
item.description: The recent increase in general sales tax (GST) on hybrid vehicles to 25% has led to significant price hikes for electrified vehicles in Pakistan. Local assemblers like Indus Motor Company and Honda At...

item.title: Ari Fletcher's biography: Background, career, and family
item.description: Ari Fletcher, an American entrepreneur and social media influencer, was born in Chicago, Illinois, in 1995. She is of African-American and Puerto Rican heritage and grew up in a working-class family. ...

item.description: The article discusses the tension between President Donald Trump's push for lower interest rates and the stance of Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller. Despite the Dow Jones Industrial Average...

item.title: Odisha Government Launches Crime Branch Inquiry Into Textbook Errors and FIR Filing
item.description: The Odisha government has directed the Crime Branch to investigate alleged factual inaccuracies, conceptual mistakes, and grammatical errors in state school textbooks. Following a high-level committee...

item.title: Nigerian Govt. Rescues Abducted Teachers and Students in Oyo State
item.description: The Nigerian government has successfully rescued over 50 teachers and students who were kidnapped by armed militants in Oyo State. The incident, which occurred on May 15, 2026, saw attackers on motorb...

item.title: Shooting at Toronto’s Salsa Festival Leaves Two Dead, Several Injured

item.title: Philippines and Allies Reaffirm Arbitral Ruling Against China's South China Sea Claims
item.description: On the 10th anniversary of the 2016 Permanent Court of Arbitration ruling, the Philippines and 14 other nations reiterated their stance against China's maritime claims in the South China Sea. The join...

item.title: Geo News Resumes Transmission After 15-Day Suspension
item.description: Geo News, a Pakistani news channel, has resumed its transmission after a 15-day suspension imposed by the Pakistan Electronic Media Regulatory Authority (Pemra). The suspension was ordered due to the ...

item.title: Rachel Reeves Advises Andy Burnham on Governance and Economic Challenges

item.title: Amber Alert Cancelled for Missing Alberta Boy, Investigation Continues
item.description: An Amber Alert for a missing six-year-old boy in Alberta has been cancelled, but the RCMP continues to investigate the abduction. Lanakai Morrison, the child in question, remains missing, and authorit...
